arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher believes Trent Alexander-Arnold performance was down to 'huge' Arne Slot problem
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold endured a torrid afternoon in Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Manchester United on Sunday

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold Liverpool critics are about to get what they want as Real Madrid watch on
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold remains out of contract at the end of the season with his Liverpool future the subject of increasing scrutiny

arts.ttl: I was in the Kop - this is why Liverpool fans can't turn on Trent Alexander-Arnold now
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold came under huge scrutiny for his performance against Manchester United amid fears about his Liverpool future.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid turn down chance to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold's Liverpool teammate
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly turn down the chance to sign one of Trent Alexander-Arnold's Liverpool teammates at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot faces major Virgil van Dijk decision as Liverpool consider overhaul
arts.sum: Liverpool are next up against Tottenham Hotspur in the League Cup with Arne Slot facing some selection posers

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts final Premier League table after Liverpool & Arsenal slip-ups
arts.sum: Opta's supercomputer predicts the final 2024/25 Premier League table after the title hopefuls drop points on Gameweek 20.

arts.ttl: 'Beat Liverpool and Forest are in the title race'
arts.sum: When Nottingham Forest face Liverpool at the City Ground next week it will be one of the most unlikely top of the table clashes.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Mohamed Salah hits out at "obsessed" Jamie Carragher in social media post
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah hits out at "obsessed" Jamie Carragher as the Egyptian's contract saga continues to rumble on.

arts.ttl: 'Liverpool were flustered and rattled - but still weren't beaten'
arts.sum: MOTD2 pundit Alan Shearer explains why there is no need for Premier League leaders Liverpool to panic after their thrilling draw with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand names the Man United player he'd seek out in the dressing room after Harry Maguire's last gasp miss against Liverpool
arts.sum: With 20 seconds to go in the Premier League clash, Joshua Zirkzee cut back the ball in the area to Harry Maguire , who blasted it over the bar with his first-time effort.
